_comment: Objectives & tutorials. Each completes when its 'trigger' event fires (optionally matching 'match'). 'reward' applies stat changes. 'unlocks' activates other objective ids. 'step' is just a label for which build introduced it. The Tasks app on the phone shows active ones.

objectives.title: Figure out who you are
objectives.desc: You woke up in a apartment that smells like ambition and mildew. At least name yourself.

objectives.title: Check your phone
objectives.desc: It's cracked, it's a hub for everything. Tap the phone button (bottom-right).

objectives.title: Open your to-do list
objectives.desc: Open the TASKS app. (You're looking at it. Meta.)

objectives.title: Know your vitals
objectives.desc: Open the STATUS app to see your needs. Stay fed, watered, and not dead.

objectives.title: Back up your life
objectives.desc: Optional but smart: Settings app, EXPORT SAVE. Drops a file you can re-import on another device.

objectives.title: Crash for the night
objectives.desc: Click the bed to sleep. Sleeping is the only way the day moves forward (and it saves your game).

objectives.title: Your gear is collecting dust
objectives.desc: There's a guitar in the corner begging to be played. (Picking up and playing instruments arrives in the next build.)
